candidate.summary: Add CLI regression coverage proving final rollup denies final response while ready Atlas nodes remain.
candidate.reason: Final responses were allowed too early in short runs. The operator-facing final rollup must deny completion when exact ready work remains.

expected_behavior: CLI imports an Atlas workgraph with 10 completed nodes and 2 ready nodes.
CLI final rollup reports completed_nodes=10 and total_nodes=12.
CLI final rollup reports ready_nodes_remaining=2, return_gate_status=early_return_denied, and final_response_allowed=false.
The exact next action remains a continuation action.
rollback: Revert the added CLI test and node evidence.
